name: youp-grid
description: Reusable TypeScript data grid core and UI adapters.
author: SeungyoupBaek

scripts.build: npm run build -w @youp-grid/core && npm run build -w @youp-grid/react && npm run build -w @youp-grid/vue && npm run build -w @youp-grid/vanilla
scripts.build:pages: npm run build && npm run build --prefix examples/react-basic -- --base=/youp-grid/
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm publish -w @youp-grid/core --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache /private/tmp/youp-grid-npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/react --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache /private/tmp/youp-grid-npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/vue --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache /private/tmp/youp-grid-npm-cache --dry-run && npm publish -w @youp-grid/vanilla --access public --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ --cache /private/tmp/youp-grid-npm-cache --dry-run
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check:parity && npm run build && npm run pack:dry-run && node scripts/check-release.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:vue
